distribution.

Vietnam's largest FMCG distribution network — bringing the world's most loved brands to over 600,000 retail outlets nationwide.

Our Footprint

An international group
with deep local roots.

The Richfield Group spans three countries and three generations of family leadership — combining international scale with hands-on knowledge of every market we serve.

Our Journey

A story of our company
over the years.

1994
Mars · USAWrigley's Doublemint partnership begins.
2016
TCP · ThailandEnergy & lifestyle drinks portfolio.
2018
BiC · FranceStationery & lighter category.
2022
Dory Rich JSCJoint venture with TCP Group.
2026
Glico · JapanPocky & confectionery.
